scenarios.description: charset(html) on HTML syntax with existing <meta charset> only updates its attribute and removes no obsolete elements
scenarios.precondition: Document.createShell("http://example") and head contains one <meta charset>
scenarios.expectedResult: existing meta[charset] attr updated to new charset, no meta[name=charset] removed
pseudocode: TEST TC09 charset updates existing HTML meta[charset] only
// Arrange a shell document with one meta[charset] element
// Assert: updated attribute and no obsolete meta[name=charset]
